content_fingerprint: openai publishes symphony an open source spec for turning issue trackers into agent systems openai has released symphony an open source specification for codex orchestration that connects issue trackers to always on agent workflows aiming to reduce context switching and increase engineering output openai published symphony on april 27 2026 an open source specification that defines how codex its autonomous coding agent can be orchestrated through existing developer tooling specifically integrating with issue trackers to run continuous agent workflows according to the openai newsroom symphony tu
